title: diospyros ferrea var. lancea
intro: Diospyros ferrea var. lancea, also known as the Lance-leaf Ebony, is a variety of the Diospyros ferrea tree, native to tropical regions in Asia and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Diospyros ferrea var. lancea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling its leaves in water to make a tea, which is believed to provide relief from colds, coughs, and other respiratory ailments.
